omitted_declarations.policy_reference: User profiles can be created and stored in a file (cookie) to display advertising content or to market advertising space (online marketing). These data can be used to determine the users' potential interests and to measure the effectiveness of online marketing. The stored data may include content accessed, websites visited, online networks used, as well as communication partners and technical information, such as the IP address, the browser used, the computer system used, and information on usage times. If users have consented to their location data being collected, this data may also be processed.
